name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Standard Terms)
description: Standard terms for a mutual non-disclosure agreement allowing both parties to share confidential information in connection with a business purpose, with obligations on use, protection, and return of confidential information.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Cover Page)
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Parties complete this with their details, the purpose of disclosure, term lengths, and governing law before signing.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Comprehensive standard terms for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering service access, user accounts, privacy, security, payment, term and termination, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement for granting a design partner early access to a product in exchange for structured feedback, allowing the provider to develop and improve the product with the partner's participation in the design program.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard terms defining uptime and response time commitments for cloud services, including how availability is calculated, service credit eligibility, and termination rights for repeated failures.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard terms for professional services engagements covering statements of work, deliverables, intellectual property assignment, subcontractors, payment, term and termination, warranties, liability caps, indemnification, insurance, and confidentiality.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard terms governing how a provider processes personal data on behalf of a customer, including GDPR compliance, processor and subprocessor relationships, restricted transfers (EEA SCCs and UK Addendum), security incident response, audit rights, and data deletion.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard terms for business partnership arrangements covering mutual obligations, trademark licensing, payment, escalation procedures, term and termination, representations, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard terms for licensing on-premise software, covering installation rights, user accounts, feedback, machine learning, open source, updates, restrictions, payment, term and termination, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term agreement allowing a prospective customer to evaluate a product or service before committing to a longer-term commercial deal, covering access rights, restrictions, disclaimer of warranties, limited liability, and confidentiality.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard HIPAA-compliant terms governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) between a covered entity and a business associate, covering permitted uses, safeguards, subcontractors, breach notification, and data return.

name: AI Addendum
description: Addendum to a base software agreement covering the use of AI and machine learning services, including input and output ownership, model training restrictions, non-training improvements, and disclaimers about the nature of AI-generated content.
